message:
feat(freeze): add native arena allocator for QuickJS

Add arena allocator for batch workloads like TSC compilation:
- Create src/native_arena.zig with bump allocation + LIFO optimization
- Enable via --allocator=arena flag in edgeboxc
- Uses JS_NewRuntime2 to hook QuickJS memory functions
- 64MB initial arena, grows in 32MB chunks
- Instant reset at end instead of individual frees

Also fix buffer.zig is_shared parameter type (bool not int).
